_docs.description: Rules for classifying warn/error log events. Add a new object to 'rules' to handle a new error type.

fields.msg: Value of the 'msg' field in the log entry to match (required)
fields.action: What to do with this event — see actions below (required)
fields.type: Display name shown in the report — required for: suspicious, suspicious_combined
fields.description: Human-readable explanation shown in the report — required for: suspicious, suspicious_combined
fields.error_contains: Optional substring match against the 'error' field. If set, rule only applies when 'error' contains this value.

actions.ignore: Silently skip — use for safe service messages that don't need attention
actions.suspicious: Immediately flag the player as suspicious in the report
actions.suspicious_combined: Flag the player only if they also have other suspicious activity (high RTP, spin rate, etc.)
actions.integration_error: Add to the Integration Errors section — requires follow-up with the operator for their logs
